candidate_pool_policy: frozen expert and LLM candidates; data-only candidates must be added as a separate family before admission
llm_role: LLM outputs are mechanism candidates or expert-edge condition verifiers only; they are not causal discoveries.

literature_guards.name: CUTS+
literature_guards.implication: probe variable and lag relations selectively instead of injecting an undifferentiated edge pool

literature_guards.name: CATCH
literature_guards.implication: prefer mask, attention-bias, channel-gate, or patch/frequency relation interfaces over crude shifted-difference channels

literature_guards.name: Corr2Cause
literature_guards.implication: do not treat LLM correlation-to-causation judgments as reliable causal discovery

literature_guards.name: LLM causal discovery survey
literature_guards.implication: use LLMs as imperfect experts for candidate generation or expert-edge conditional verification
